items.title: Obama Presidential Center Grand Opening Set for June 18 — What to Expect
items.description: The Obama Presidential Center's grand opening ceremonies kick off Juneteenth weekend with a dedication on the John Lewis Plaza. Tickets for the museum are now live — grab yours before they sell out.

items.title: Taste of Randolph Returns for Its 29th Year — Full Lineup Announced
items.description: Chicago Restaurant Row's beloved outdoor food festival returns June 19–21 with two live music stages, 30+ restaurants, and craft cocktails. Free admission all weekend.

items.title: Juneteenth Weekend in Chicago: 20+ Events to Know About
items.description: From the DuSable Museum's free celebration to the R&B concert at Wintrust Arena, this is the most packed Juneteenth weekend Chicago has ever seen. Full event guide inside.

items.title: Chicago Pride Fest Schedule Released — What's New This Year
items.description: Pride Fest on Halsted Street runs June 20–21 with headliner performances, drag shows, and an expanded food and vendor village. The weekend overlaps with Juneteenth for a historic double celebration.

items.title: Chicago's Hottest New Restaurants of Summer 2026
items.description: The West Loop keeps getting hotter with three new openings this month alone. Plus, a beloved Bronzeville spot just announced a major expansion and two new brunch menus have gone viral.

items.title: Millennium Park Summer Concert Series — Full 2026 Schedule
items.description: Free outdoor concerts return every Monday and Wednesday this summer at the Jay Pritzker Pavilion. Sheila E. headlines Juneteenth Monday on June 22 — one of the most anticipated shows of the year.
